study_group_representative.quote: We discuss COVID-19 control approaches in selected African countries and the need for shared, affordable, innovative methods to overcome challenges and minimize mortality.

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: By the end of April 2020, more than 6 million people had been screened and 42 000 referred for testing.

follow_up_length_reported.quote: The arrival of coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) on the African continent resulted in a range of lockdown measures that cur tailed the spread of the infection but caused economic hardship.

outcome_assessors_blinded.quote: Of note, screening is done mainly by doctors and other CHCWs.

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: Globally, the current gold standard test for SARS-CoV-2 infection is detection of viral RNA in a sample from the respiratory tract by reverse transcriptase polymerase chain reaction [6–8].
